immediate_actions: EMERGENCY REFACTORING: All 3 commands require immediate complexity reduction
TOKEN DIET: Implement aggressive verbosity reduction program
DEPENDENCY DETOX: Eliminate non-essential dependencies across the board
systematic_improvements: Implement automated complexity monitoring with CI/CD gates
Establish token consumption budgets with enforcement
Create dependency review process with risk assessment
Mandate CLAUDE.md compliance training for all contributors
quality_gates: No command deployment without maintainability score >6
Mandatory peer review for any command with >10 dependencies

appendix.claude_md_standards_reference: Complexity limit <5, simplicity first, no premature abstraction
